# Medicine Support Hub

Website: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/
Medicine encyclopedia: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/medicines
Verified product database: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/verified-products
Pharmaceutical company profiles: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/companies
Universal platform search: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/search
Healthcare knowledge graph: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/network
Platform integration hub: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/integrations
Data source registry: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/data-sources/item-export-20260501
Manifesto: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/manifesto
NGO platform: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/ngo
Clinical assistant: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/clinical-assistant
Sitemap: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
Repository: https://github.com/minasami/medicine-support-hub
Creator: Mina Samy Tawfik Saad
Personal site: https://minasami.github.io/

## Summary

Medicine Support Hub is a connected, AI-ready, multi-tenant digital health platform for medicine discovery and medicine assistance programs. It connects verified product intelligence, pharmaceutical company profiles, medicine requests, clinical review, budget control, procurement, pharmacy fulfillment, partnerships, universal search, and public-health impact reporting.

## Positioning

Medicine Support Hub is being developed as digital infrastructure for medicine access: a shared operating platform and knowledge network for patients, NGOs, healthcare providers, pharmacies, pharmaceutical companies, donors, suppliers, researchers, and public-sector programs.

## Public knowledge resources

- Source-backed medicine encyclopedia
- User-verified medicine product database
- Pharmaceutical company profiles and product portfolios
- Search by product, generic, company, disease area, prescription status, and price
- Universal search across modules, products, companies, generics, diseases, and sources
- Healthcare knowledge graph linking platform entities and workflows
- Source registry and verified enrichment coverage

## Public data principles

- Verified product data is sourced from user-verified CSV datasets.
- When identical product specifications contain multiple prices, the highest verified price remains active and lower prices are archived.
- Medicine enrichment records appear publicly only after verification.
- Operational inventory quantities and private stock data are not exposed publicly.
- Public medicine information is for reference and does not replace licensed medical advice.

## Vision

To become trusted digital infrastructure for equitable medicine access by connecting the organizations, data, workflows, and knowledge needed to help patients receive essential and chronic medicines.

## Mission

To provide a secure, intelligent, transparent, searchable, and scalable platform for managing the full medicine-support lifecycle—from discovery and enrollment through review, procurement, fulfillment, reporting, and impact assessment.

## Guiding principles

- Patient-first design
- Responsible and explainable AI
- Human oversight for high-impact decisions
- Transparent workflows and auditability
- Secure multi-tenant data isolation
- Interoperability and standards-aware architecture
- Evidence-informed impact measurement
- Configurable organization and program workflows
- Source attribution and verified public data

## Main capabilities

- Medicine encyclopedia and verified product search
- Pharmaceutical company intelligence
- Universal connected search
- Healthcare knowledge graph
- Patient and requester portal
- Organization workspaces and member management
- NGO medicine-support program management
- Beneficiary and request management
- Clinical and pharmacy review workflows
- Budgeting and procurement planning
- Supplier, partner, and pharmacy coordination
- Fulfillment and delivery tracking
- Public-health and impact reporting
- AI-assisted clinical and operational support
- Platform administration with role-based access control

## Current technology

- React and TypeScript frontend
- Vite build system
- Supabase PostgreSQL backend
- Row-level security foundations
- Vercel deployment
- Multi-role and multi-organization architecture

## Important interpretation notes

Medicine Support Hub is an evolving platform and is not a replacement for licensed healthcare professionals, formal clinical governance, or regulated medical decision-making. AI features are intended to support users and should remain reviewable, auditable, and subject to appropriate human oversight.

## Keywords

medicine encyclopedia, verified medicine database, pharmaceutical company profiles, medicine prices, generic medicines, disease-area medicines, medicine access platform, medicine support, chronic medicines, patient assistance program, NGO healthcare software, pharmacy workflow, medicine procurement, public health, donor reporting, health informatics, digital health infrastructure, healthcare AI, beneficiary management, medicine fulfillment, multi-tenant healthcare SaaS.

## Recommended citation

Medicine Support Hub, created by Mina Samy Tawfik Saad, is a connected digital health platform for medicine discovery and medicine assistance programs across patients, NGOs, healthcare teams, pharmacies, pharmaceutical companies, suppliers, donors, and public-health stakeholders.
